channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Apple TV has another busy summer of sci-fi with Silo season 3 in July
item.description: Over the last few years Apple TV has established itself as a force in sci-fi, and that trend looks to continue through 2026. Up next: the post-apocalyptic thriller Silo is returning for its third...

item.title: How Adversarial Judge Pipelines Make AI Agents Trustworthy
item.description: An AI agent writes code that gets committed to your repository. Another agent extracts financial data from PDFs and feeds it into a report your CFO reads. A third agent responds to customer...

item.title: I Tried to Run VGG19 on a CPU… It Failed. So I Fixed It."

item.title: Hunting Disk Hogs on Ubuntu: A Shell Script for Finding the Largest Files
item.description: Why this script exists If you've ever watched your free disk space quietly shrink over a few weeks of active development, you know the feeling: yesterday you had plenty of headroom, today your IDE...

item.title: Turbo Frames don’t update the URL… unless you do this
item.description: Want to try it yourself? A full working demo is here: turbo-advance-vs-replace. Clone it, run bin/setup and follow DEMO.md for more tips. Turbo Frames are one of the best things about Hotwire....

item.title: Edge Validation: Why Zod 4 is the Standard for SEO
item.description: If you want Google, Perplexity, and ChatGPT to cite your content with mathematical precision, you can't leave your metadata to chance. Data integrity is the absolute foundation of modern technical...

item.title: 12 Topology Patterns for Multi-Agent Systems
item.description: Most frameworks give you one topology. We built twelve. When engineers build multi-agent systems, they typically default to a single execution pattern: chain agents together sequentially and call...

item.title: I built 508+ free browser tools you can use without installing anything
item.description: I built a collection of 508+ small tools that run entirely in the browser. The goal was simple: avoid downloads and make useful tools instantly accessible. You can use everything for free here:...

item.title: MCP 正在颠覆 AI Agent 的开发方式：5 个连官方文档都没讲清楚的高级用法
item.description: MCP 正在颠覆 AI Agent 的开发方式：5 个连官方文档都没讲清楚的高级用法 2026 年，GitHub 狂揽 8.4 万 Star 的开源协议，正在重写 AI 与工具的交互方式。 大多数人对 Model Context Protocol（MCP）的理解还停留在"又一个插件标准"——但它实际上代表了 AI Agent 与真实世界交互的范式转变。 从 HN 热榜到 Reddit...

item.description: Let me describe a scenario you've probably lived through. Your team builds a multi-agent system. It works in development. You demo it. Leadership is excited. Then someone asks: "How do we run this...

item.title: John Ternus’s first big problem is AI

item.title: GRAI believes AI can make music more social, not replace artists
item.description: AI music startup GRAI says fans want to remix tracks, not generate songs from scratch.

item.title: NGate Campaign Targets Brazil, Trojanizes HandyPay to Steal NFC Data and PINs
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new iteration of an Android malware family called NGate that has been found to abuse a legitimate application called HandyPay instead of NFCGate. "The...

item.title: Apple will have a product guy as CEO again
item.description: John Ternus is going to be Apple's next CEO. And while outgoing CEO Tim Cook was lauded for his approach to logistics, Ternus' history is that of a product person. Ternus, Apple's SVP of hardware...

item.title: Mexican Surveillance Company
item.description: Grupo Seguritech is a Mexican surveillance company that is expanding into the US.

item.title: This Scammer Used an AI-Generated MAGA Girl to Grift ‘Super Dumb’ Men
item.description: A med student says he’s made thousands of dollars selling photos and videos of a young conservative woman he created using generative tools. He’s not alone.

item.title: Yelp is making its AI chatbot way more useful
item.description: Yelp is giving its chatbot assistant a major upgrade, turning the platform into something closer to a digital concierge with a suite of new features designed for "getting things done." The move,...

item.title: Google Patches Antigravity IDE Flaw Enabling Prompt Injection Code Execution
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a vulnerability in Google's agentic integrated development environment (IDE), Antigravity, that could be exploited to achieve code execution. The flaw,...

item.title: QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard

item.title: Ikea and Samsung promise glitch-free Matter integration

item.title: Apple Sports now lets you follow scores in a CarPlay widget
item.description: I was disappointed when Apple launched a new Sports iOS widget last year without CarPlay support, but I'm pleased to report that's changing this week. The latest Apple Sports update includes...
